tools.name: web2md_convert
tools.description: Convert a URL or file to clean Markdown. Removes ads, navbars, and noise while preserving article structure.

url.description: HTTP/HTTPS URL or local file path to convert

js.description: Enable JavaScript rendering for SPAs (slower, uses Playwright)

tools.name: web2md_batch
tools.description: Convert multiple URLs to Markdown in batch. Returns array of conversion results.

js.description: Enable JavaScript rendering for all URLs

tools.name: web2md_status
tools.description: Check cache status and performance metrics

clearCache.description: Clear the cache before returning status

tools.name: web2md_convert_file
tools.description: Convert a local file to Markdown. Supports HTML files and text files.
